content.full_text:
April 10, 1990

Sandra Taylor
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Re: California Business Credit PAC
ID #860229

Dear Ms. Taylor,

After discussions with you and Gail Jackson, of the Political Reform Division, it appears that the CBC-PAC may not be required to file a Campaign Disclosure Statement (Form 420). The CBC-PAC has never contributed funds to any campaign or candidate, nor does it contemplate doing so. Also, the CBC-PAC does not retain a paid lobbyist. The CBC-PAC uses its funds to monitor bills and does not participate in election campaigns. Please advise us as to what our filing requirements are. Thank you for your assistance.

Very truly yours,

Alan E. Ramos,
Treasurer, CBC-PAC

cc: Gail Jackson, Political Reform Div.
     Gloria Gilmore, Political Reform Div.
